Apartments and Rooms Drago is located in a small town called Sv. Stefan, a peaceful city with a lot of promenades. It offers beautiful views of the sea and fully equipped air-conditioned accommodation. The property has its own restaurant serving local specialties.
Rooms and apartments at Drago feature a sofa bed and the living room. A fully equipped kitchen with a dishwasher is available in the apartment, while the private bathroom features a washing machine. Balconies offer a view of the sea.
Four sandy beaches are located near the apartments. The main city beach is just 150 metres away, while the Milocer sandy beach is 800 metres away. Bars, stores and souvenir shops can be found in the vicinity.

Boasting a private beach area right on the Sveti Stefan Beach, Hotel California by Aycon is a small 5-star hotel offering elegantly-decorated rooms on the scenic Adriatic coast of Montenegro. Its guests can enjoy free sun loungers and views of the picturesque Sveti Stefan Peninsula. Free WiFi is available throughout the property.
At the hotel, each accommodation unit comes with air conditioning, a flat-screen satellite TV and an electric kettle. Private bathrooms feature a shower and a hairdryer. Some rooms also offer beach and the Adriatic Sea views.
